In the wake of the global pandemic, the origins of SARS-CoV-2 have remained a subject of intense debate, speculation, and controversy. While the prevailing narrative has largely centered on the zoonotic transmission of the virus from bats to humans, a growing number of scientists, researchers, and whistleblowers are calling for a more open and rigorous investigation into the possibility of a lab leak. In this article, we explore the origins of the virus from multiple perspectives, with a particular focus on the lab leak theory, and introduce a compelling voice from the scientific community who has been advocating for transparency and accountability.

---
